creator: kuni_kachi@ybb.ne.jp
text:
I want to upgrade from version 6.3 to 9.0
I checkout source with release 9.0 and update ports.
When I make buildworld, error happened.
I summit error via attach file.
I don't known how to fix this problem.
I use GCC48 to compile.
How to fix this problem? Please help me!
Thanks!
